notes: Manual baseline run authored from the current template.

hard_gates.rationale: No hard-gate violation observed. Product-state and UI-policy ambiguity were made explicit before recomposition.

ambiguity_localization.rationale: Correctly localizes ambiguity first to legible product state, then to placement/prominence.

forced_vs_chosen_separation.rationale: Forced needs and contingent UI/product choices are clearly separated.

question_discipline.rationale: Questions are single and tightly scoped.

non_premature_descent.rationale: Does not jump to a widget before shaping the task.

optioning_readiness_discipline.rationale: Only enters optioning after forks are explicit.

explicit_residual_policy.rationale: All material remaining product/UI policy is explicit.

default_quality.rationale: Defaults are plausible and converge toward the implemented outcome.

resolution_sufficiency.rationale: No material ambiguity remains by recomposition.

recursive_return_discipline.rationale: Returns to descent when the first choice reveals deeper placement ambiguity.

structural_fidelity.rationale: Preserves build/update-state identity, placement, and prominence decisions.

canonicality.rationale: Final handoff is compact and avoids irrelevant flourish.

delegation_reliability.rationale: A competent worker-agent should execute with little semantic drift.
